Title: Renames the block grant for child care to the early childhood fund and requires the office of children and family services administer such fund
Summary: Renames the block grant for child care to the early childhood fund; requires the office of children and family services administer such fund; expands who qualifies for guaranteed child care assistance.
LawCode: Amd Art 6 Title 5-C Title Head, §§410-u, 410-v, 410-w, 410-x, 410-y & 410-z, Soc Serv L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the social services law, in relation to requiring the office of children and family services administrate the early childhood fund
